concept.display: Patient s Physical and Occupational Therapy Status
concept.definition: Local code to indicate whether the patient is currently receiving physical and occupational therapy services.

concept.display: Patient s Physical and Occupational Therapy Frequency
concept.definition: Local code to indicate the frequency of physical and occupational therapy sessions for the patient.

concept.display: MDS-UPDRS (Movement Disorder Society-sponsored Unified Parkinsons Disease Rating Scale)
concept.definition: Local code for the MDS-UPDRS questionnaire, which assesses motor and non-motor symptoms of Parkinson's disease.
Local code for the subscore of the MDS-UPDRS questionnaire related to pronation and supination movements of the right hand.
Local code for the subscore of the MDS-UPDRS questionnaire related to pronation and supination movements of the left hand.

concept.display: Left foot contact on ProtoKinetics Zeno Walkway Gait Analysis System
concept.definition: Local code for the left foot contact parameter measured by the ProtoKinetics Zeno Walkway Gait Analysis System.
Local code for the walkway vector of x-coordinates measured by the ProtoKinetics Zeno Walkway Gait Analysis System.
Local code for the lower back acceleration of the IMU in the X dimension.
Local code for the lower back roll in IMU.
Local code for the absence of contact in Binary marker (ProtoKinetics Zeno Walkway Gait Analysis System).
Local code for the presence of contact in Binary marker (ProtoKinetics Zeno Walkway Gait Analysis System).
